message:
fix(security): length-prefix hash inputs in 4 files to prevent delimiter collision

- artifact_contract.rs: make_artifact() payload hash used colon-delimited format
- main.rs: registration attestation hash used colon-delimited format
- compatibility_gate.rs: receipt signing payload and verification used colon-delimited
- proof_executor.rs: signature digest used pipe-delimited format

All switched to length-prefixed encoding. Verification functions updated to match.

Closes bd-342x

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
